label: Transparent lionfish motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a lionfish fins motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as one complete lionfish subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A dramatic red lionfish with accurate ornate fan fins, long amber venom spines, crisp red-and-white zebra striping, pearly white fin membranes rendered mostly opaque for clean cutout edges, dark reef-ink eye detail, and refined coral-reef fish anatomy. The pose should emphasize radiating protective fins and spines for an ornate security-system mood. It must read clearly as lionfish, not koi, betta, perch, or generic tropical fish.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include head, body, pectoral fins, dorsal spines, pelvic fins, and tail without cropping. Slight three-quarter side view, elegant radial silhouette, clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no coral reef background, no water, no bubbles, no rocks, no sand, no other fish, no props, no frame, no text, no watermark.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Lionfish", derived from the visible transparent lionfish cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible product UI theme.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the visible lionfish: red-and-white zebra striping, amber venom spines, pearl fin membranes, deep reef ink shadows, coral reef context, and radiating protective fin geometry. The board must visibly respect the motif colors and serve as a reference for coding an ornate security system.
Canvas: exact 16:9 board, intended final output 3840x2160.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board. Use large readable labels, precise grid, and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Lionfish, Lionfish Fins, Light Mode, Motif Story, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics, Japanese UI. Show multilingual product UI guidance with short readable labels.
Full component coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, breadcrumb, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, empty state, loading state, error state, spacing scale, radius scale, border tokens, shadow tokens, texture samples, small motif asset preview, shield and lock icons.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, realistic crisp UI mockup, 8px card radius, light pearl reef surfaces, red stripe primary controls, amber spine active highlights, reef teal selection and chart accents, coral warning surfaces, dark reef-ink text, fin-ray dividers, stripe texture panels, precise 8px grid, ornate security-system mood.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif: pearl reef white, fin membrane blush, lionfish red stripe, deep blood stripe, amber spine, reef teal, coral warning, graphite eye, deep reef ink.
Text: use short readable UI labels; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no tropical rainbow palette, no aquarium neon, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Lionfish", no illegible microtext.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the visible Morphous Lionfish design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible lionfish cutout.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent lionfish cutout and visible light-mode Morphous Lionfish board as references. Preserve the lionfish red stripe, deep blood stripe, amber spine, pearl reef white, fin blush, reef teal, coral warning, graphite eye, and deep reef ink palette roles; radiating fin-ray dividers; striped texture panels; Japanese typography; security-system icons; and shadcn/tweakcn component coverage.
Canvas: exact 16:9 board, intended final output 3840x2160.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board. Use large readable labels, precise grid, and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Lionfish, Lionfish Fins, Dark Mode, Motif Story, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Generated Assets.
Full component coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, breadcrumb, dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut chart, empty state, loading state, error state, spacing scale, radius scale, border tokens, shadow tokens, texture samples, small motif asset preview, shield and lock icons.
Visual details: dark background derived from deep reef ink and graphite eye, cards like midnight coral reef panels, foreground from pearl reef white, primary red stripe controls, amber spine active highlights, reef-teal focus rings and charts, coral warning/destructive states, subtle fin membrane texture overlays, crisp 8px-radius product UI, ornate security-system mood.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Metrics, Japanese UI. Keep text short and legible on dark reef surfaces.
Text: use short readable UI labels; no long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon aquarium colors, no tropical rainbow palette, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible microtext, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Lionfish".
